description:
They disturbed a sealed temple. Now, an ancient evil has followed them to Springdale. 
When the archaeologists start dying in seemingly "accidental" ways, the town whispers of a curse. 

Skeptical but determined, Lana and Bill enter a shadowy world where logic fails, and they must fight an enemy that can't be touched by handcuffs or bullets. 

- Colorful and intuitive solitaire challenges
- Finish compelling quests
- Solve hundreds of solitaire levels
- Crack the case and catch the killer
